title: Kaynak ↔ Muhasebe Tutar Mutabakatı
description: Her fiş için: kaynak belge tutarı, muhasebe borç/alacak toplamı, fark ve eşleşme durumu
sourceQuery: SELECT AC.CARD_ID, AC.ACTION_DATE, AC.ACTION_TYPE, AC.ACTION_ID, AC.CARD_CAT_ID, AC.CARD_DETAIL, AC.PAPER_NO, AC.ACC_COMPANY_ID, ISNULL(SPC.PROCESS_CAT, 'Diger') AS ISLEM_KATEGORISI, CASE AC.ACTION_TYPE WHEN 56 THEN 'ALIS_FATURA' WHEN 59 THEN 'SATIS_FATURA' WHEN 58 THEN 'FATURA_DIGER' WHEN 120 THEN 'MASRAF_FISI' WHEN 23 THEN 'BANKA_VIRMAN' WHEN 24 THEN 'GELEN_HAVALE' WHEN 25 THEN 'GIDEN_HAVALE' WHEN 41 THEN 'CARI_DEKONT' WHEN 121 THEN 'BANKA_GELIR' WHEN 250 THEN 'TOPLU_HAVALE' WHEN 113 THEN 'STOK_FIS' WHEN 13 THEN 'MUHASEBE_FISI' ELSE 'TIP_' + CAST(ISNULL(AC.ACTION_TYPE,0) AS NVARCHAR) END AS KAYNAK_TABLO, INV.NETTOTAL AS INV_KDVLI_TOPLAM, INV.GROSSTOTAL AS INV_KDV_HARIC, INV.TAXTOTAL AS INV_KDV, EXP.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS EXP_NET, EXP.KDV_TOTAL AS EXP_KDV, EXP.TOTAL_AMOUNT_KDVLI AS EXP_KDVLI_TOPLAM, BA.ACTION_VALUE AS BANKA_TUTAR, CA.ACTION_VALUE AS CARI_TUTAR, COALESCE(INV.NETTOTAL, EXP.TOTAL_AMOUNT_KDVLI, BA.ACTION_VALUE, CA.ACTION_VALUE) AS KAYNAK_TOPLAM, ACR_SUM.BORC_TOPLAM, ACR_SUM.ALACAK_TOPLAM, ACR_SUM.SATIR_SAYISI, ABS(COALESCE(INV.NETTOTAL, EXP.TOTAL_AMOUNT_KDVLI, BA.ACTION_VALUE, CA.ACTION_VALUE, 0) - ISNULL(ACR_SUM.BORC_TOPLAM, 0)) AS MUTLAK_FARK, CASE WHEN ABS(COALESCE(INV.NETTOTAL, EXP.TOTAL_AMOUNT_KDVLI, BA.ACTION_VALUE, CA.ACTION_VALUE, 0) - ISNULL(ACR_SUM.BORC_TOPLAM, 0)) <= 1 THEN 'ESIT' WHEN COALESCE(INV.NETTOTAL, EXP.TOTAL_AMOUNT_KDVLI, BA.ACTION_VALUE, CA.ACTION_VALUE) IS NULL THEN 'KAYNAK_YOK' ELSE 'FARK_VAR' END AS ESLESMEE_DURUMU, C.FULLNAME AS CARI_ADI FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD] AC WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink_7].[SETUP_PROCESS_CAT] SPC WITH (NOLOCK) ON SPC.PROCESS_CAT_ID = AC.CARD_CAT_ID LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[INVOICE] INV WITH (NOLOCK) ON INV.INVOICE_ID = AC.ACTION_ID AND AC.ACTION_TYPE IN (56, 58, 59) LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[EXPENSE_ITEM_PLANS] EXP WITH (NOLOCK) ON EXP.EXPENSE_ID = AC.ACTION_ID AND AC.ACTION_TYPE = 120 LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[BANK_ACTIONS] BA WITH (NOLOCK) ON BA.ACTION_ID = AC.ACTION_ID AND AC.ACTION_TYPE IN (23, 24, 25, 121, 250) LEFT JOIN [{schema}].[CARI_ACTIONS] CA WITH (NOLOCK) ON CA.ACTION_ID = AC.ACTION_ID AND AC.ACTION_TYPE = 41 LEFT JOIN (SELECT CARD_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN BA = 1 THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS BORC_TOPLAM, SUM(CASE WHEN BA = 0 THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS ALACAK_TOPLAM, COUNT(*) AS SATIR_SAYISI FROM [{schema}].[ACCOUNT_CARD_ROWS] WITH (NOLOCK) GROUP BY CARD_ID) ACR_SUM ON ACR_SUM.CARD_ID = AC.CARD_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[COMPANY] C WITH (NOLOCK) ON C.COMPANY_ID = AC.ACC_COMPANY_ID WHERE AC.ACTION_ID IS NOT NULL AND AC.ACTION_ID > 0

tenantBoundary.reason: Yearly partition rotation; schema name encodes year and tenant boundary
